dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.help_aria_label: What do the slot statuses mean?
dashboard.no_printers_body: Head to the Printers page to add your first Bambu printer.

empty.title: Waiting for AMS data
empty.body: The printer hasn't reported its state yet.

unauthorized.title: Invalid access code
unauthorized.description: The printer rejected the access code. Verify it on the Printers page.

no_response.title: No response from printer
no_response.description: Connected successfully but the printer isn't reporting state. Verify the serial number on the Printers page.

unreachable.title: Printer unreachable
unreachable.description: Couldn't connect to the printer. Verify the host (IP or hostname) on the Printers page.

sync_status.stale_tooltip: Spool #{{spool_id}} out of date since {{at}} — slot changed

status.legend_intro: Each AMS slot is matched against a community-maintained list of Bambu spools. The badge tells you whether the spool is recognized and ready to sync to Spoolman.

mapped.label: Mapped
mapped.description: Known Bambu spool with a Spoolman equivalent. Ready to sync.

unmapped.label: Unmapped
unmapped.description: Known Bambu spool, but no Spoolman equivalent yet.

unknown.label: Unknown
unknown.description: Bambu spool we don't recognize yet.

third_party.label: Third party
third_party.description: Non-Bambu spool or no RFID tag.

notifications.duplicate_serial: A printer with this serial number is already configured.

connection_card.title: Spoolman connection
connection_card.hint: Point this at your Spoolman instance to enable syncing matched AMS slots as spools.
connection_card.auto_sync_hint: When a matched slot changes, push it to Spoolman automatically.
connection_card.archive_on_empty_hint: When a spool's remaining weight reaches zero, archive it in Spoolman.

actions_card.title: Actions
actions_card.hint: Push every matched AMS slot across all printers to Spoolman.
